creator: markun@onohara.to
text:
sorry, I forgot to edit pkg-descr.
correct shar file is as follows

Best Regards,


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-WWW-Tumblr/
#	p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-descr
#	p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile
#	p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-plist
#	p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo
#
echo c - p5-WWW-Tumblr/
mkdir -p p5-WWW-Tumblr/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-descr << '1cfce8dc832e682f41ac3a74bcc75e12'
XPerl interface for the Tumblr API
X
XWWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/WWW-Tumblr/
1cfce8dc832e682f41ac3a74bcc75e12
echo x - p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-WWW-Tumblr/Makefile << '8b545502b0ec850e5a54839d6d094592'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-WWW-Tumblr
X# Date created:		2010-03-14
X# Whom:			TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun@onohara.to>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	WWW-Tumblr
XPORTVERSION=	4.1
XCATEGORIES=	www perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	markun@onohara.to
XCOMMENT=	Perl interface for the Tumblr API
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=		WWW::Tumblr.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
8b545502b0ec850e5a54839d6d094592
echo x - p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-WWW-Tumblr/pkg-plist << 'd6b98accc545d3fcc8d18d6bcafbcbdd'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Tumblr/.packlist
X%%SITE_PERL%%/WWW/Tumblr.pm
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Tumblr
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/WWW
d6b98accc545d3fcc8d18d6bcafbcbdd
echo x - p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-WWW-Tumblr/distinfo << '287d9175c16e426b93105c63a1d8a363'
XMD5 (WWW-Tumblr-4.1.tar.gz) = c55d27137280c55ff297cf6370c94f19
XSHA256 (WWW-Tumblr-4.1.tar.gz) = 869547155e25a2c2ccf2d4cae3dd9b2907d06cb34537983e14dd2497e0b3c29c
XSIZE (WWW-Tumblr-4.1.tar.gz) = 4830
287d9175c16e426b93105c63a1d8a363
exit



-- 
TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun@onohara.to>
